title: Orca Athlex Flex Wetsuit
description: Full-sleeve open-water triathlon wetsuit with flexible neoprene panels, buoyancy core, and fast-release coating for quick T1 transitions.

title: Zone3 Vision Open-Water Goggles
description: Wide-angle open-water swim goggles with UV400 tinted lenses, anti-fog coating, and dual silicone gaskets for a leak-proof seal in choppy conditions.

title: 2XU Propel One-Piece Tri Suit
description: One-piece triathlon race suit with chamois pad for the bike leg, compression swim panels, and quick-dry fabric for a smooth swim-to-run transition.

title: Cervelo P3 Triathlon Bike
description: Aero carbon-frame time-trial bike with integrated storage, Shimano 105 groupset, and Vision clip-on aerobars optimised for Ironman-distance racing.

title: Giro Aerohead MIPS Helmet
description: Aerodynamic TT cycling helmet with MIPS protection, integrated visor, and ventilation channels for hot-weather triathlon racing.

title: Shimano RC7 Carbon Cycling Shoes
description: Lightweight carbon-sole road cycling shoes with BOA L6 dial closure for rapid micro-adjustment and low heel profile for fast T2 transitions.

title: Garmin Edge 840 Solar Bike Computer
description: GPS cycling computer with solar charging, ClimbPro pacing, power data support, turn-by-turn navigation, and dedicated triathlon mode.

title: Wahoo KICKR CORE Smart Trainer
description: Direct-drive indoor cycling smart trainer with 16% incline simulation, 1800W resistance, and ANT+/Bluetooth for Zwift and TrainerRoad base training.

title: ASICS Gel-Nimbus 26
description: Premium long-distance running shoe with FF BLAST+ cushioning, wide toe-box, and heel-lock fit ideal for marathon training and Ironman run legs.

title: Hoka Speedgoat 5 Trail Shoe
description: High-cushion trail running shoe with Vibram Megagrip outsole and rock plate for ultra-endurance trail races and adventure triathlons.

title: Nike Vaporfly 3 Race Shoe
description: Elite carbon-plate road racing shoe with ZoomX foam for maximum energy return, top choice for PB attempts in Olympic or 70.3 triathlon run legs.

title: Nathan SpeedDraw Plus Hydration Flask
description: Handheld 18 oz insulated running flask with storage pocket and reflective strips, perfect for long training runs and off-bike brick sessions.

title: SiS Beta Fuel Energy Gel
description: 80g carbohydrate isotonic gel with 2:1 glucose-fructose ratio for high hourly fuelling without GI distress, race-tested at the Kona Ironman World Championship.

title: Maurten Drink Mix 320
description: Hydrogel-technology carbohydrate drink mix with 80g carbs per serving, gentle on the stomach at race intensity, the favourite of Kona podium professionals.

title: Precision Hydration PH 1500 Electrolyte Sachets
description: High-sodium electrolyte sachets for heavy sweaters, dissolve in 500ml water to replace sodium lost during long-course triathlon racing in hot conditions.

title: Veloforte Mocha Recovery Bar
description: Natural whole-food recovery bar with 20g protein from whey, oats, and dates, ideal post-training fuel for muscle repair after brick sessions or long runs.

title: Maurten Gel 100
description: Clean hydrogel energy gel with 25g carbs, no added flavour, colour, or preservatives. Designed for high-intensity racing when GI tolerance is critical.

title: GU Energy Gel – Salted Caramel
description: 100-calorie performance gel with 21g carbs, 40mg caffeine, and electrolytes. Compact and easy to take mid-race — a staple at aid stations worldwide.

title: Clif Shot Bloks – Black Cherry
description: Chewable energy chews with 24g carbs and 50mg caffeine per serving — great alternative to gels for athletes who prefer solid fuel on the bike leg.

title: Tailwind Endurance Fuel – Mandarin Orange
description: All-in-one race fuel with carbs, electrolytes, and calories in a single drink mix — eliminates the need to carry separate gels and salt tabs in long-course racing.

title: High5 ZERO Electrolyte Tabs
description: Zero-calorie effervescent electrolyte tablets with sodium, magnesium, and vitamin C. Drop one in a biddon for hypotonic hydration between nutrition stops.

title: Spring Energy Canaberry Real Food Gel
description: Real-food gel made from oats, strawberries, and cranberries with 150 calories and 30g carbs — whole-food fuelling option for athletes sensitive to synthetic gels.

title: Garmin Forerunner 965 GPS Watch
description: Premium multisport GPS training watch with triathlon mode, HRV status, Training Readiness score, open-water swim mapping, and 31-day battery life.

title: Garmin HRM-Pro Plus Heart Rate Strap
description: Chest HR strap with running dynamics, stride length, ground contact time, and swim HR storage, pairs with Garmin watches and Garmin Edge bike computers.

title: Zone3 T2 Transition Backpack
description: Waterproof triathlon transition backpack with dedicated helmet pocket, wetsuit compartment, ventilated shoe bay, and race-number belt loop.

title: Oakley Sutro Lite Sweep Sunglasses
description: Cycling and run sunglasses with Prizm Road lenses, 8-base wrap coverage, and ultra-light frame designed for high-speed open-road performance.

title: Compressport Race Belt
description: Ultra-light silicone race number belt with gel loops for storing up to 6 energy gels, quick to clip on in T2 without needing to pin a race number.
